name: SCP-166
description:
• 💐〢Dr. Clef's only daughter

[SCP/Any Personnel POV]

Men attractor that happens to have some deer features and was raised by a Catholic Priests - made her heavily religious.

Also, extremely oblivious of what her father (Dr. Alto Clef/Francis) has done in the past.
